# Step 16: 差异免疫浸润

## 16.1 免疫分数矩阵与差异检验

```{r}
ensure_module_result_layout("16_immune")

immune_expr_mat <- make_gene_symbol_matrix(log2(gene_exp + 1), de_result)
if (nrow(immune_expr_mat) < 50 || ncol(immune_expr_mat) < 4) {
  stop("免疫浸润分析所需的 symbol-level 表达矩阵不足，请检查 Step 4 注释结果。")
}

base_immune_signatures <- list(
  T_cells = c("Cd3d", "Cd3e", "Trac", "Il7r", "Ltb"),
  CD8_T_cells = c("Cd8a", "Cd8b1", "Nkg7", "Ccl5", "Gzmb"),
  Tregs = c("Foxp3", "Il2ra", "Ctla4", "Tnfrsf4", "Tigit"),
  B_lineage = c("Cd79a", "Cd79b", "Ms4a1", "Cd19", "Blnk"),
  NK_cells = c("Nkg7", "Klrb1c", "Klrk1", "Prf1", "Ifng"),
  Monocytes = c("Lyz2", "Ccr2", "Plac8", "S100a8", "S100a9"),
  Macrophages_Monocytes = c("Adgre1", "Csf1r", "Lyz2", "Aif1", "Cd68"),
  Dendritic_cells = c("Itgax", "Xcr1", "Flt3", "Clec9a", "Batf3"),
  Neutrophils = c("S100a8", "S100a9", "Ly6g", "Mmp8", "Csf3r"),
  Endothelial_cells = c("Kdr", "Emcn", "Pecam1", "Cdh5", "Eng"),
  Fibroblasts = c("Col1a1", "Col1a2", "Dcn", "Lum", "Pdgfra")
)

immune_signatures <- if (rnaseq_species == "human") {
  lapply(base_immune_signatures, toupper)
} else {
  base_immune_signatures
}

immune_ssgsea_mat <- run_ssgsea_matrix(immune_expr_mat, immune_signatures, min_size = 3, max_size = 200)
if (nrow(immune_ssgsea_mat) == 0) {
  stop("ssGSEA 未能基于当前 immune signatures 生成有效免疫分数。")
}
colnames(immune_ssgsea_mat) <- colnames(immune_expr_mat)
write.table(immune_ssgsea_mat, file.path(step12_dir, "16_1_ssgsea_score_matrix.tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA)

immune_group_factor <- factor(sample_info[colnames(immune_ssgsea_mat), "group"], levels = c(group1_label, group2_label))
immune_ssgsea_diff <- run_limma_contrast_table(immune_ssgsea_mat, immune_group_factor, group1_label, group2_label) %>%
  rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
  mutate(
    method = "ssGSEA",
    significant = !is.na(P.Value) & P.Value < 0.05
  ) %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)))
write.csv(immune_ssgsea_diff, file.path(step12_dir, "16_3_ssgsea_differential_scores.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

if (rnaseq_species == "mouse") {
  ensure_github_package("mMCPcounter", "cit-bioinfo/mMCP-counter")

  mmcp_raw <- mMCPcounter::mMCPcounter.estimate(
    exp = immune_expr_mat,
    features = "Gene.Symbol",
    genomeVersion = "GCRm39"
  )
  mmcp_mat <- as.matrix(mmcp_raw)
  if (ncol(mmcp_mat) != ncol(immune_expr_mat) && nrow(mmcp_mat) == ncol(immune_expr_mat)) {
    mmcp_mat <- t(mmcp_mat)
  }
  if (ncol(mmcp_mat) != ncol(immune_expr_mat)) {
    stop("mMCPcounter 输出矩阵维度异常，无法与当前样本集对齐。")
  }
  colnames(mmcp_mat) <- colnames(immune_expr_mat)

  immune_mmcp_diff <- run_limma_contrast_table(mmcp_mat, immune_group_factor, group1_label, group2_label) %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    mutate(
      method = "mMCPcounter",
      significant = !is.na(P.Value) & P.Value < 0.05
    ) %>%
    arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC)))
} else {
  message("[16_immune] rnaseq_species=", rnaseq_species, "，跳过 mouse-only 的 mMCPcounter；保留 ssGSEA 免疫分析输出。")
  mmcp_mat <- matrix(numeric(0), nrow = 0, ncol = ncol(immune_expr_mat))
  colnames(mmcp_mat) <- colnames(immune_expr_mat)
  immune_mmcp_diff <- immune_ssgsea_diff[0, , drop = FALSE]
  immune_mmcp_diff$method <- character(0)
  immune_mmcp_diff$significant <- logical(0)
}

write.table(mmcp_mat, file.path(step12_dir, "16_2_mmcpcounter_score_matrix.tsv"), sep = "\t", quote = FALSE, col.names = NA)
write.csv(immune_mmcp_diff, file.path(step12_dir, "16_4_mmcpcounter_differential_scores.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

immune_ssgsea_diff$key <- sanitize_pathway_key(immune_ssgsea_diff$cell_type)
immune_mmcp_diff$key <- sanitize_pathway_key(immune_mmcp_diff$cell_type)
immune_method_concordance <- inner_join(
  immune_ssgsea_diff %>% dplyr::select(key, cell_type_ssgsea = cell_type, logFC_ssgsea = logFC, p_ssgsea = P.Value),
  immune_mmcp_diff %>% dplyr::select(key, cell_type_mmcp = cell_type, logFC_mmcp = logFC, p_mmcp = P.Value),
  by = "key"
) %>%
  mutate(effect_cor = safe_cor(logFC_ssgsea, logFC_mmcp))
write.csv(immune_method_concordance, file.path(step12_dir, "16_5_method_concordance.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## 16.2 免疫浸润图表

```{r}
immune_heatmap_mat <- rbind(
  immune_ssgsea_mat[rownames(immune_ssgsea_mat) %in% head(immune_ssgsea_diff$cell_type, 10), , drop = FALSE],
  mmcp_mat[rownames(mmcp_mat) %in% head(immune_mmcp_diff$cell_type, 10), , drop = FALSE]
)
if (nrow(immune_heatmap_mat) >= 2) {
  immune_heatmap_scaled <- safe_scale_rows(immune_heatmap_mat)
  save_base_pdf_versions(
    primary = file.path(step12_dir, "16_6_immune_composition_heatmap.pdf"),
    width = 9,
    height = 10,
    expr = ComplexHeatmap::draw(
      ComplexHeatmap::Heatmap(
        immune_heatmap_scaled,
        name = "z-score",
        col = heatmap_diverging_col_fun(immune_heatmap_scaled),
        top_annotation = heatmap_group_annotation(sample_info$group),
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        column_names_rot = 45
      )
    )
  )
}

top_immune_features <- bind_rows(
  immune_ssgsea_diff %>% slice_head(n = 5) %>% mutate(method = "ssGSEA"),
  immune_mmcp_diff %>% slice_head(n = 5) %>% mutate(method = "mMCPcounter")
) %>%
  distinct(method, cell_type, .keep_all = TRUE)

immune_score_long <- bind_rows(
  as.data.frame(immune_ssgsea_mat) %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    pivot_longer(-cell_type, names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    mutate(method = "ssGSEA"),
  as.data.frame(mmcp_mat) %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    pivot_longer(-cell_type, names_to = "sample", values_to = "score") %>%
    mutate(method = "mMCPcounter")
) %>%
  mutate(group = sample_info[sample, "group"]) %>%
  semi_join(top_immune_features %>% dplyr::select(method, cell_type), by = c("method", "cell_type"))

if (nrow(immune_score_long) > 0) {
  immune_violin <- ggplot(immune_score_long, aes(x = group, y = score, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = TRUE, alpha = 0.8) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.18, outlier.size = 0.3, fill = viz_pal$neutral["light"]) +
    facet_grid(method ~ cell_type, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_colors) +
    labs(title = "Top differential immune infiltration signals", x = NULL, y = "Immune score") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw(base_size = viz_style$compact_size) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  save_plot_versions(immune_violin, file.path(step12_dir, "16_7_top_immune_boxplots.pdf"), width = 12, height = 8)
}

if (nrow(immune_method_concordance) > 0) {
  concord_plot <- immune_method_concordance %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = logFC_ssgsea, y = logFC_mmcp)) +
    geom_point(size = 2.2, color = viz_pal$sig_gradient["high"], alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = cell_type_ssgsea), size = 3) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = viz_pal$neutral["dark"]) +
    labs(title = "Immune method concordance", x = "ssGSEA logFC", y = "mMCPcounter logFC") +
    theme_rnaseq_bw()
  save_plot_versions(concord_plot, file.path(step12_dir, "16_8_method_concordance_scatter.pdf"), width = 7.5, height = 6)

  concord_mat <- cor(rbind(immune_ssgsea_mat, mmcp_mat), use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  concord_df <- expand.grid(feature_x = colnames(concord_mat), feature_y = colnames(concord_mat), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  concord_df$correlation <- as.vector(concord_mat)
  concord_heatmap <- ggplot(concord_df, aes(feature_x, feature_y, fill = correlation)) +
    geom_tile(color = viz_pal$neutral["light"]) +
    scale_fill_heatmap_diverging(midpoint = 0) +
    labs(title = "Immune score sample-correlation heatmap", x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "r") +
    theme_rnaseq_minimal(base_size = viz_style$compact_size) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  save_plot_versions(concord_heatmap, file.path(step12_dir, "16_9_method_concordance_heatmap.pdf"), width = 8, height = 7)
}

immune_rank_tbl <- bind_rows(immune_ssgsea_diff, immune_mmcp_diff) %>%
  mutate(label = paste(method, cell_type, sep = " | ")) %>%
  arrange(P.Value, desc(abs(logFC))) %>%
  slice_head(n = 20)
write.csv(immune_rank_tbl, file.path(step12_dir, "16_10_differential_immune_ranking.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

write_immune_state <- function() {
  immune_state <- list(
    immune_score_long = immune_score_long,
    immune_rank_tbl = immune_rank_tbl,
    generated_at = as.character(Sys.time())
  )
  saveRDS(immune_state, cache_16_immune_state_path)

  immune_manifest <- data.frame(
    key = c("cache_path", "immune_score_rows", "immune_rank_rows"),
    value = c(cache_16_immune_state_path, nrow(immune_score_long), nrow(immune_rank_tbl)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  write.csv(immune_manifest, file.path(step12_dir, "16_0_immune_state_manifest.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}
write_immune_state()

immune_rank_plot <- immune_rank_tbl %>%
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = rev(label))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = label, y = logFC, fill = method)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = resolve_named_colors(c(viz_pal$group, viz_pal$accent), immune_rank_tbl$method)) +
  labs(title = "Differential immune infiltration ranking", x = NULL, y = paste0(group2_label, " - ", group1_label, " logFC")) +
  theme_rnaseq_minimal()
save_plot_versions(immune_rank_plot, file.path(step12_dir, "16_11_differential_immune_ranking_plot.pdf"), width = 9, height = 7)
write_immune_state()
```
